title_en: A New Order for the Bedroom
description: Mr. Zhang returns to buy a bedroom set and gets a bundle discount.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang comes back to the showroom for bedroom furniture.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Welcome back, Mr. Zhang. How is the sofa?
lines.zh: 欢迎再次光临，张先生。沙发怎么样？

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Very comfortable. Now I need a bedroom set.
lines.zh: 非常舒服。现在我需要一套卧室家具。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Wonderful. Let me show you our latest collection.
lines.zh: 太好了。让我带您看看我们最新的系列。

scenes.description: Li Wei shows a solid wood bed frame.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: This king-size bed frame is solid walnut wood.
lines.zh: 这款特大号床架是实心胡桃木的。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I like the color. Is it strong enough?
lines.zh: 我喜欢这个颜色。它够结实吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Yes, it supports up to 300 kilograms.
lines.zh: 是的，它可以承重高达300公斤。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang tries the mattress for comfort.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: This mattress feels firm but comfortable.
lines.zh: 这个床垫感觉结实但舒适。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It has memory foam and pocket springs for back support.
lines.zh: 它有记忆棉和独立袋装弹簧，可以支撑背部。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: Can I try lying on it?

scenes.description: They look at nightstands that match the bed frame.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: These nightstands match the bed frame perfectly.
lines.zh: 这些床头柜和床架完美搭配。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.zh: 它们的抽屉是缓冲关闭的吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Yes, and the handles are brushed brass.
lines.zh: 是的，把手是拉丝黄铜的。

scenes.description: Mr. Zhang asks about a wardrobe with sliding doors.

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: I also need a wardrobe with sliding doors.
lines.zh: 我还需要一个推拉门衣柜。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: This one has a mirror and plenty of hanging space.
lines.zh: 这款带镜子，还有很多挂衣空间。

scenes.description: Li Wei offers a discount for buying the full bedroom set.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: If you buy the bed, two nightstands and wardrobe together, you get 20% off.
lines.zh: 如果您一起购买床、两个床头柜和衣柜，可以享受八折优惠。

lines.speaker: Mr. Zhang
lines.en: That's a great deal. I'll take the whole set.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Thank you. I'll prepare the contract for you.
